overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a futuristic outdoor market stall in a desert urban area. The player walks around a clothing vendor under a metal canopy, with a large rusted ship structure visible in the background. Bright midday sun creates strong shadows across the concrete ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic market stall under metal canopy

events.description: camera completes circling the vendor and begins moving past the merchandise table

agents.ego_description: circling around the market stall, observing the seated vendor and clothing merchandise from various angles

notable_agents.action: vendor with cybernetic implants sitting in folding chair under the canopy, wearing white top and red pants

entered.detail: corrugated metal roof structure providing shade over the stall
large neon sign with 'BIG' text visible on the left side

stacked cardboard boxes under the merchandise table
garments hanging from the canopy structure

segments.scene_description: The player walks around a market stall under a corrugated metal canopy, observing a seated vendor with visible cybernetic implants. The stall displays folded clothing on a metal table with cardboard boxes underneath, while garments hang from the canopy structure. A white mannequin stands near the entrance and a large rusted ship structure is visible in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: open market plaza with ship structure

events.description: exits the covered market stall into direct sunlight, revealing the open plaza and ship structure
pedestrian in green jacket walks past the camera from left to right

agents.ego_description: moving past the merchandise table into the open market area, examining the ship structure and surrounding stalls

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing green jacket and yellow boots walking past the camera

entered.detail: adjacent market stall with illuminated displays and neon lighting
vertical neon light strips on the neighboring stall
illuminated signs and advertisements on the right side stalls
open concrete area leading toward the waterfront ship structure

segments.scene_description: Moving out from under the canopy into bright direct sunlight, the camera reveals the open market plaza with a massive rusted ship structure dominating the background. The player passes by the merchandise table and encounters a pedestrian in a green jacket walking through the plaza. Additional market stalls with vibrant neon signage line the right side as the camera approaches the waterfront area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the shaded interior of a market stall out into a sprawling, sun-drenched urban plaza. It begins under a corrugated metal canopy, passing a cybernetic vendor and displays of folded clothing and mannequins while a rusted ship structure looms in the far distance. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts from the dim shelter into bright direct sunlight, fully revealing the massive scale of the rusted ship dominating the background. The perspective then expands across the open plaza, passing a pedestrian in a green jacket and gliding past vibrant neon signage on adjacent stalls before finally approaching the waterfront area.
